properties.name: Feature: 2E Target 20
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Converts 2E's roll-under ability and skill checks to a unified d20 + bonus >= 20 system. Ability checks: d20 + Table 44 ability modifier (Player's Option: Skills and Powers p.89) + character level. Skill/proficiency checks (ability-linked, not percentile): the same, plus the skill's own existing Class/Stat/Racial/Armor/Skill/Miscellaneous modifiers. Percentile skills and saving throws/attacks are untouched.
